description: Sync Snowflake databases, schemas, and tables into the Shielva knowledge base via the Snowflake SQL API v2.

install_fields.label: Account Identifier
install_fields.help: Your Snowflake account identifier. Found in your Snowflake URL: https://<account>.snowflakecomputing.com. For multi-region accounts include the region (e.g. abc12345.us-east-1).

install_fields.label: Username
install_fields.help: Snowflake username for the service account.

install_fields.label: Password
install_fields.help: Password for the Snowflake service account.

install_fields.label: Warehouse (optional)
install_fields.help: The virtual warehouse to use for query execution. Uses the account default if not set.

install_fields.label: Default Database (optional)
install_fields.help: Default database context for SQL execution. The connector will still discover all accessible databases during sync.

install_fields.label: Role (optional)
install_fields.help: Snowflake role to activate for the session. Uses the user's default role if not set.
